model.title: Model
model.cloudDescription: Select a cloud AI model. Requires an API key for the provider.
model.noApiKeyWarning: No API key configured for {{provider}}. Add one below.
model.required: Please select a model to continue

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: Setup the API key and model for your own AI coworker.
apiKey.invalidFormat: Invalid API key format. Key should start with {{prefix}}
apiKey.savedReconnectToSee: API key saved (reconnect to see prefix)

accomplishAi.description:
Use the built-in model powered by Accomplish - no API key required.
Includes 200 free credits per month to get you started.
accomplishAi.exhaustedMessage: Credits exhausted. They will reset on {{date}}.
accomplishAi.exhaustedMessageSoon: Credits exhausted. They will reset soon.

status.selectModelToComplete: Select a model to complete setup

common.toolUnsupported: This model does not support tool/function calling
common.toolUnsupportedDetail: Tasks requiring browser automation or file operations will not work correctly.
common.toolUnknown: Tool support could not be verified
common.toolUnknownDetail: This model may or may not support tool/function calling. Test it to confirm.
common.contextLengthWarningDetail: Ensure your model is loaded with a large enough context length (max available recommended) in LM Studio settings.

lmstudio.serverHint: Start LM Studio and enable the local server in Developer settings

vertex.pasteJsonPlaceholder: Paste your service account JSON key here...
vertex.dropJsonHere: Drop your service account JSON key here
vertex.missingFields: Missing required fields (type, project_id, private_key, client_email)
vertex.noProjectsError: No projects found. Make sure gcloud is installed and ADC is configured.
vertex.loadProjectsFailed: Failed to load projects. Is gcloud installed and ADC configured?
vertex.fetchingProjects: Fetching GCP projects from your account...

ollama.description: Connect to a local Ollama server to use models running on your machine.
ollama.helpText: Make sure <link>Ollama</link> is installed and running, then click Test to connect.

azure.entraIdHelp: Uses your Azure CLI credentials. Run
azure.endpointAndDeploymentRequired: Endpoint URL and Deployment Name are required
azure.apiKeyRequired: API Key is required for API Key authentication

openai.baseUrlDescription: Optional: Override the default OpenAI API endpoint

toggle.label: Desktop Notifications
toggle.description: Show OS notifications when tasks complete while the app is in the background.

status.failedMessage: The daemon could not start or reconnect. Try restarting manually.

closeBehavior.label: Window Close Behavior
closeBehavior.keepDescription: Closing the window hides it to the system tray. The daemon keeps running and tasks continue in the background.
closeBehavior.stopDescription: Closing the window stops the daemon and quits the app. Running tasks will be terminated.
closeBehavior.warning: Background features (external integrations) will not work when the window is closed.

warningDialog.title: Disable Background Mode?
warningDialog.description: This will terminate any running tasks when you close the window. Background features like external integrations will stop working.

confirmDialog.title: Are you sure?
confirmDialog.description: Tasks in progress will be lost when you close the window. This is not recommended for most users.

socket.title: Daemon Socket
socket.description: External clients (CLI tools, integrations) can send tasks via the local daemon socket using JSON-RPC 2.0.

appearance.title: Theme
appearance.description: Choose how Accomplish looks. Select System to match your operating system setting.
appearance.themeDescription: Choose how Accomplish looks. Select System to match your operating system setting.

connectors.title: Connectors
connectors.description: Connect built-in and custom MCP servers so Accomplish can use external tools.
connectors.empty: No custom MCP servers added yet
connectors.customDescription: Add your own remote MCP server URL. OAuth is supported for servers that expose the standard authorization flow.
connectors.urlMustBeHttp: URL must start with http:// or https://

cta.authHint: Accomplish will open your browser to authorize access.
cta.pendingHint: Authorization was started but not finished. Reconnect to try again.
cta.connectedHint: Connected and ready for the agent to use.

connectors.marketplaceHint: This connector requires the app to be installed from the marketplace.

slack.title: Slack
slack.description: Authenticate Slack so the agent can send messages and use Slack context through the built-in Slack MCP.
slack.authHint: Accomplish will open your browser so you can approve Slack access.
slack.pendingHint: A Slack sign-in was started earlier but not finished. Restart it to try again.
slack.connectedHint: Slack is authenticated and ready for the agent to use.

jira.title: Jira
jira.description: Let the agent create, update, and search Jira issues in your Atlassian workspace.

github.title: GitHub
github.description: Let the agent read and manage GitHub repositories, issues, and pull requests via the gh CLI.

notion.title: Notion
notion.description: Let the agent read and update Notion pages and databases in your workspace.

monday.title: monday.com
monday.description: Let the agent manage boards, items, and updates in your monday.com workspace.
monday.marketplaceHint: Install the Accomplish app from the monday.com marketplace first.

lightdash.title: Lightdash
lightdash.description: Let the agent query your Lightdash dashboards and metrics.
lightdash.instanceUrlHint: Enter your Lightdash instance URL (e.g. https://app.lightdash.cloud).
lightdash.instanceUrlRequired: Please enter a valid Lightdash instance URL.
lightdash.authHint: Once the URL is saved, connect to authorize Lightdash access.
lightdash.pendingHint: Authorization was started but not finished. Reconnect to try again.
lightdash.connectedHint: Connected and ready for the agent to use.

datadog.title: Datadog
datadog.description: Let the agent query Datadog metrics, logs, and monitors.
datadog.authHint: Once the region is saved, connect to authorize Datadog access.
datadog.pendingHint: Authorization was started but not finished. Reconnect to try again.
datadog.connectedHint: Connected and ready for the agent to use.

openrouter.description: Access 200+ AI models through OpenRouter's unified API.

huggingfaceLocal.serverHint: Run a local HuggingFace Transformers.js inference server with ONNX Runtime
huggingfaceLocal.infoBannerDescription: Models run locally using ONNX Runtime. Smaller quantized models (Q4) are recommended for faster inference.

litellm.description: Connect to your LiteLLM proxy server for unified model access.

skills.noProviderWarning: Please configure an AI provider in Settings first.
skills.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this skill should do...
skills.uploadDescription: Select a skill folder to import
skills.importDialogDescription: Enter the URL of a GitHub repository containing a SKILL.md file.
skills.uploadFailedDescription: The skill could not be uploaded.
skills.uploadErrorHelp: Make sure your SKILL.md file has valid YAML frontmatter with at least a

developer.title: Developer
developer.debugDescription: Show detailed backend logs in the task view.
developer.debugEnabled: Debug mode is enabled. Backend logs will appear in the task view when running tasks.

about.title: About
about.description: Accomplish is a local computer-use AI agent for your Mac that reads your files, creates documents, and automates repetitive knowledge work—all open-source with your AI models of choice.
about.contact: Any questions or feedback? Click here to contact us

warnings.noProviderReadyDescription: You need to connect a provider and select a model before you can run tasks.

speech.title: Speech-to-Text
speech.description: Enable voice input using ElevenLabs Speech-to-Text API
speech.setupInstructions: To use speech input, you need an ElevenLabs API key. Get one at
speech.apiKeyConfigured: ElevenLabs API key is configured. Enter a new key below to replace it.
speech.secureStorage: Your API key is stored securely in your system keychain.
speech.tooltipSetup: Click to set up voice input
speech.tooltipError: Error during transcription - Click to retry
speech.tooltipDefault: Click to record or hold {{modifierKey}} to record voice input

integrations.title: Messaging Integrations
integrations.description: Connect messaging platforms to trigger Accomplish tasks remotely. When enabled, you can start and monitor tasks from your phone or any device.
integrations.enableDescription: Allow receiving and responding to messages
integrations.remoteAccessDescription: Open a secure tunnel so messages can reach this machine from anywhere

platforms.whatsapp: Trigger tasks and receive updates via WhatsApp messages
platforms.slack: Connect Slack workspace for task management
platforms.telegram: Use Telegram bot to interact with Accomplish
platforms.teams: Integrate with Teams channels and chats

whatsapp.scanQr: Scan the QR code below with your WhatsApp app to connect this device. Go to WhatsApp > Settings > Linked Devices > Link a Device.
whatsapp.qrPlaceholder: QR code will appear here when the WhatsApp service starts
whatsapp.securityNotice: By connecting WhatsApp, you grant Accomplish access to your WhatsApp messages. All data remains on your device and is not shared externally.

baseUrl.title: Base URL
baseUrl.description: Leave empty to use the default URL.

scheduler.title: Scheduled Tasks
scheduler.description: Automate recurring tasks with cron expressions. Schedules persist across daemon restarts.
scheduler.empty: No scheduled tasks. Create one to automate recurring work.
scheduler.autoStartWarning: Enable 'Start at Login' in Settings → General to ensure schedules fire after system restart.

addDialog.title: New Scheduled Task
addDialog.cronHelp: 5-field format: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week. Examples: '0 9 * * *' (daily at 9am), '0 9 * * 1-5' (weekdays at 9am), '*/30 * * * *' (every 30 min)
addDialog.promptPlaceholder: Check email and summarize important items

knowledgeNotes.title: Knowledge Notes
knowledgeNotes.description: Persistent context injected into every task in this workspace

errors.updateFailed: Note not found or could not be updated.
errors.deleteFailed: Note not found or could not be deleted.

knowledgeNotes.empty: No knowledge notes yet. Add notes to give your AI persistent context.
